name: SAP on Cloud
description: SAP Platinum Partner delivering end-to-end S/4HANA hosting, migration, and managed operations as a RISE with SAP Premium Supplier — with 4,000+ SAP experts, 850,000 managed SAP users, and SAP Activate-certified delivery across private cloud, AWS, and Azure.
positioning: SAP Platinum Partner delivering end-to-end S/4HANA hosting, migration, and operations as a RISE with SAP Premium Supplier.
